description: Abyssal Depths Patch 7 (14 October 2025) — Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Fixes

subsections.heading: UI Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where “Crafted by” player name in Item Details UI could be cut off in some languages
Fixed issue where /r or /reply chat commands did not function correctly
Fixed issue where Friend Requests could not be scrolled in the Social UI
Fixed issue where stats in the Inventory Details flyout would not update after changing regions
Fixed issue where the second page of the Arena Stats UI would not display character, guild, or alliance names
[MOBILE] Fixed issue where Minimap tooltip would display “Safe Region” in lethal regions

subsections.searchable_text: UI Fixes Fixed issue where “Crafted by” player name in Item Details UI could be cut off in some languages Fixed issue where /r or /reply chat commands did not function correctly Fixed issue where Friend Requests could not be scrolled in the Social UI Fixed issue where stats in the Inventory Details flyout would not update after changing regions Fixed issue where the second page of the Arena Stats UI would not display character, guild, or alliance names [MOBILE] Fixed issue where Minimap tooltip would display “Safe Region” in lethal regions

subsections.heading: Spell Fixes

items.text: Tethershift (Shapeshifter Staffs): Fixed issue where guild, alliance, and party members in cities could be pulled
Power Geyser (Hammers): Fixed issue where party members could be moved in Caerleon
